assets/images/the-relationship-image.htm.title: The relationship image
assets/images/the-relationship-image.htm.description:
Li DelunBig BabySmall BabyDoleHan ZhihengWardenMayorMayor's daughterPolice officersJuly 8, 2100. Li Delun was caught in prison because of the crime. But his crime is “Dating with mayor of silly city’s daughter.”“Li Delun, go to prison with us.” Police’s angry voice rang.“Police, I’m sorry. I don’t want to be dating with mayor’s girl forever.” Li Delun begged him.“Tootle! Go to prison with us!” Police spoke again.“No!!! Please spare me!” Li Delun shouted.(Sense: The first prison of the silly city)“This is your cell. The 67th cell. Don’t forget it, or else we can’t help you.”“Alright! I remembered it.” Li Delun accepted fact. He took that crime paper:The Silly City Citizens Court Accuser: Mayor Delegate: Mayor's daughter defendant: Li Delun Crime: Dating with mayor of silly city’s daughter Judge Li Delun life imprisonment after our deliberation. He looked at this paper because he knew that here would be his home forever. The 2nd morning. The guard to the 67th cell.“Bucko! Get out of your cell. To work!” The guard yelled at Li Delun.“Alright! Alright! Alright! I know it.” Li Delun had a dark circle. Come out from cell.“Your work is mining today. You must get 6000 grams of iron, or else you can’t have lunch today.” The guard spoke again.“Alright! I know it.” Li Delun spoke.Li Delun went to find the guard 4 hours later.“Guard! I did it!” Li Delun took 6000 grams iron to speak.“You are the slowest in all prisoners! If you are so slow tomorrow. You can’t have lunch!” The guard angrily spoke.“I know! Now, I can go having lunch?” Li Delun spoke.“You can go having lunch now.” The guard spoke.Li Delun went to dining hall. He found an empty seat that sat down.He took a plate of potato that tasted that a plate of potato.“Fuck mother! Fuck father! This dining hall is very smelly. The food is very tasteless!” After speaking. Li Delun went to the toilet to spit out that food.At night, Li Delun was finally can go back to his cell.He wanted to leave the prison, wanted to why he could imprisonment? He is just dating the mayor’s daughter.He wanted to future life how should live?Just time could give answer.Delun entered prisonOn the second day. Li Delun is like yesterday that it was asked to work by the guard.In mine. Li Delun’s face is full of weakness and worrying, he was afraid he wouldn’t have lunch because he did not have dinner yesterday. Currently he is very famished.3 hours laterFinally, Li Delun had enough iron. He went to find guard.“Guard! Guard! I’m the first finish work!” Li Delun’s face is full of happiness.“Look, you are the first finish work so you can go having lunch.” The guard said.Li Delun went to the dining hall. He chose a plate of cooked steak.“Well! Today’s food got delicious! But the environment is so bad!” Li Delun ate steak, said.At 2:15 p.m., free time. Li Delun would go back to his cell.Suddenly, a guy appeared.“Bucko! Stop running” he said.“Why?” Li Delun said.“We watched you are very long! Our boss ’Big baby’ asked you to do his fart cushion!” that guy said.“If I say ‘None’?” Li Delun said.The guy took a fake gun out.“Follow me or else…”“Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! The guy. I agree your demand!” Li Delun is very afraid. He was scared that guy was starting to start the gun.“OK! Introduce me. My name is ‘Small Baby’. It’s our boss’ brother.” He spoke.
“So, tell me where ‘Big baby’ is cell?” Li Delun said.“Okay! Follow me.”Li Delun followed him. 5 minutes later, they got to “Big baby” is cell.He saw a tubby after Li Delun entered the cell. That guy is very fat.“So, you are that new dude by my brother commended.” Big baby said.“It’s me” Li Delun said.“Okay! Welcome to join my team. You will become my fart cushion!”“Now! Lie Down! I will sit down onside of your body.” Big baby said.
Li Delun can only lie down because he knew that he might die if he didn’t follow his command.A few minutes later. Big Baby sat onside his body.“Big Baby. I have a problem.” Li Delun said.“Said.”“Can I leave here? Because current the dinner time.” He spoke.“None! You can’t leave here bro, or else you will die” Big Baby said.“Please! Let me leave.” Li Delun said again.“None! None of my all-fart cushion can leave here.” Big Baby said.Li Delun thought he could have meal until 7 PM. But at 6:40 p.m. “Big Baby” make a fart!“Pu!”He farted just now.“No! This fart is so smelly! Please make me to become your guard!”“You? Becoming our guard? Haha! Just you spend 800 days doing my fart cushion! You can become our guard!”“800 days? Are you serious?” Li Delun said.“Yes.” Big baby said.“Oh no! I don’t want to wait 800 days!”“Why isn’t you’re from fart cushion become guard?” Li Delun asked the small baby.“Because I’m his brother. I have power.” Small Baby said.“Alright! Can I leave?” Li Delun asked.“You can leave now.” Big Baby said.Li Delun left Big Baby’s cell. He would go back to his cell.He didn’t know what would happen tomorrow. Because today’s things happened made him amazing already. So, he didn’t also think that things would happen tomorrow.The prison bully's fart

chapters/fifth/a-tragedy-of-about-soap.h.title: A tragedy of about soap
chapters/fifth/a-tragedy-of-about-soap.h.description:
One day, Li Delun was going to bath. He has done his two works. Coincidentally, Big Baby came too. They started bathing.However, his soap fell down the ground when Li Delun used soap. Li Delun wanted to pick up the soap, but he afraid that he was attacked by people. He know the meme. So, he did not wanted to pick up."I f*** your immortal, my soap fall down the ground. Shall I pick up it? If I pick up soap, then I will be attached by others. If I do not pick up it, then I cannot bath." Li Delun wanted.However, Big Baby came too.
"Hey! Li Delun? Why do you do not pick up the soap?" Big Baby said.
"Quickly, to pick up it!"
We can think of Li Delun was attached by Big Baby when he picks up the soap.
"No! I know you will attach me. I refuse to pick up the soap."
"Your soap borrow me."
"Don't want. You are to pick up your own soap." Big Baby said.
Li Delun can only he went to pick up it.
Li Delun bent over to pick up the soap.
Then, Li Delun's screaming rang out within the bathhouse
"I was attacked." Li Delun said.
"This is the people's result who bent over to pick up the soap" a prisoner said.
"No! I will tell the officer." Li Delun said, but he did not tell officer because of Big Baby.At tonight. Li Delun think that today's experience. He felt that today is very bad because he was attacked by others. He can only think how is tomorrow's life. He is asleep.The second day
Li Delun is like before go to mine. He gets ore is the most.
"Bucko! You can go to have lunch." the guard's sound rang.Li Delun has gotten to the dining hall, but he found that the dining hall got different.
"It's the action of the silly city again." Li Delun said.
Li Delun chose a place and he sat down."Li Delun? Are you?" near person said to Li Delun.
"Dole? Are you in the prison too?" Li Delun asked.
"Yep!"
"Shall we escape here out together?" Li Delun asked to Dole.
"Ok!" Dole said.Li Delun got to Dole's cell. Talk escape plan with Dole.
"I've a friend. He doesn't be caught. I ask him to help us escape here."
"Ok!"
"Meet tomorrow's night."
"Yep!"
Li Delun came back to his own cell. He was waiting tomorrow's plan. He hopes the plan can succeed.Li Delun is going to take part in a competition. The content of this competition is whose dropping is more. Winner can get 1000 $ and have permission to don't do daily work. Li Delun is for 1000 $."You know what? Big Baby's fart cushion is also took part in the competition."
"Ha ha ha ha! He? I eat the dropping if he will win."
Several prisoner said.
Li Delun didn't manage their words.The time is very fast. Competition was holding.
In the competition place, Li Delun is hardly produce dropping, but his dropping is less than his rival. "This competition is Li Delun lose! I proclaim -- Big Baby win! Let's celebrate the winning of Big Baby!"People cheered for Big Baby. No one care about Li Delun."Mr. Big Baby. This is your money."
"Damn, that originally is mine!" Li Delun thought.

chapters/forth/the-second-time-imprisonm.title: The second time imprisonment
chapters/forth/the-second-time-imprisonm.description:
Starting from Li Delun enter prison again. His life get difficult because he must give guard 8 kg mine every day. However, Li Delun did a pair of friend with a prisoner. His name is Dole. Li Delun's friendship is very good with him. Though he became Big Baby's fart cushion again, but he get happiness.Time get to a day's morning."Bucko! Get out of your cell! You have a problem!" the guard said.
"What? Don't I offend anyone? Why?" Li Delun said.
"Follow me!" the guard said.Several minutes later."We arrived at place." the guard said.
"So, what crime I have?" Li Delun said again.
"Wait sometimes."
After the guard said. He left.A man came. He has a cap, it's 40 years old. He is the warden.
"Li Delun! So you must sweep for a toilet because your mine 1 g less yesterday." the warden said.
"Why? I do not commit a crime." Li Delun said.
"I don't manage. You must go sweeping toilet. You will know result if you don't go sweeping toilet." the warden said.
"Alright. Can I leave?" Li Delun said.
"You can leave now."After Li Delun had lunch. He was going to sweep the toilet."No way! So smelly that my nose is getting really faulty." Li Delun said.
When Li Delun stretches head into the commode. Suddenly!"No!" Li Delun shouted. "I ate a dropping!"
"What a distasteful!"Other prisoners enter. They looked at Li Delun. They started having a talk with others.
"Look! Someone ate a dropping!"
"Is that Li Delun?"
"Hahaha!"Police officers came here.
"All of prisoners, get out of here!" a police officer spoke.
All of prisoners left here."We will carry you to a hospital." after, they carry Li Delun away.
At the hospital."Your guy is no problem, just need to wash his stomach."
"Yeah! Start to wash now." the officer said.
"Okay!"
Some times later.
Li Delun came back to prison."Oh! I finally came back here." Li Delun said.
"However, I have a thing must do."
"It's to do fart cushion for Big Baby." Li Delun said.After he said, he went looking for Big Baby's cell."Boss, I will do fart cushion for you." Li Delun said.
"Oh! You can lie down." Big Baby said.
Li Delun has accustomed this life. Have to say, Li Delun's life may get good because others do not hate him."Your work has done. You can leave now." Big Baby said.
"Really? So early?" Li Delun said.
"I asked you to leave that you must leave." he said again.
"Yeah yeah yeah." Li Delun said.Several minutes later. Li Delun arrived at his cell. He started summing up his today's experience. At first, he swept the toilet. Then, he was sent by prison officers. Then again, he did the fart cushion for Big Baby, then he early had done his work. He felt that today is his happiest day because he got much loving from everyone.Don't know that several minutes later. Li Delun has slept. He dreamed that he became a hero to save the world. Though this is a joking but he thought this his happiness. He are willing happy forever. He also hope that everyone can get happy.

chapters/sixth/friend's-helping.html.title: Friend's helping
chapters/sixth/friend's-helping.html.description:
Tonight, the prison is very quiet. But Li Delun and Dole aren't quiet because they will do a big thing -- They will leave this prison."Delun! Follow me."
"Yep."Li Delun followed Dole. He can't make any sound or else they will be caught back cell."Delun. What is your friend's name?"
"Han Zhiheng. He wasn't caught. He will carry us away prison."Suddenly! A mouse made a sound.
"I f*** your immortal!" Li Delun thought.
Dole was also afraid.
"Quickly."
"Yeah."They got to outside of prison. They're seeing is there car.
Soon, they found a car. They found there is a person in the car.
That guy is Han Zhiheng!"Delun? Is it you?" Han Zhiheng asked Li Delun.
"Yes. I've a friend. He wanted also to leave the prison."
"Can you carry him away?"
"Yes."
"Both of you get in the car."
Li Delun was thinking."Quickly! Li Delun. Our time is so less!" Han Zhiheng said.
"I know."
Then, Li Delun got in the car.Within the car. Li Delun chatted with others."Zhiheng! I'm so long was not met you."
"Rightly! Me too."
"What's your name? Zhiheng" Dole said.
"My name is Han Zhiheng. You should know it."
"What a good! We will leave this prison!" Li Delun said.Suddenly, at this time. A dog appeared.
"Woh! Woh! Woh!" Dog's sound rang."I f*** your immortal! There's a dog! Let me banish it!"
"Delun! You have to quickly do because I feel there are police officers."
"Yes!"Li Delun went to banish the dog.
"I f*** your immortal, you this guy, get out here!" Li Delun said to dog.
"Woh! Woh! Woh!" Dog still rang.
"I will kill you! Dog!" Li Delun said.However, police officers get here while he was gonna kill the dog."Li Delun! Come back with us!" A police officer said.
"Delun! Go car!" Han Zhiheng said to Li Delun.
"Yeah!"
"Stop him." one of police officer said.
But, Li Delun still be go car.
"Quickly! Leave here." Li Delun said.
"Yep."30 minutes later. Li Delun and the others enter into a dead way.
"Ha ha ha ha! Stop running." A police officer said.
"No! We won't come back with you!" Li Delun said.
"Han Zhiheng, leave here. I will make a fart!""I don't believe you can make a fart is smellier than Big Baby's" The police officer said.
"Either you smell my fart, or you leave."
"I choose to smell your fart!"
"OK! Han Zhiheng, Dole, leave here."
"OK!"Suddenly! A big sound rang. That is Li Delun's fart! He made a fart is smellier than Big Baby!
"No no no no no! What is this? Why does this fart is smellier than Big Baby's?"
"Leave here! I cannot accept it!" Another police officer said.
"Yes sir!"Then, those police officers leave here. Li Delun and his friend lived life that no prison and Big Baby."Han Zhiheng! What a good!" Li Delun said.
"Yes, bro!" Han Zhiheng and Dole said.
"Good men! Can you give me some money? I don't have any money!" A homeless said."Oh, homeless? I will give you some money. Psych! Give you a slap. Shall you get it?" Li Delun said.
"I f*** your immortal! Do you dare to give me your name!"
"Li Delun! Han Zhiheng! and Dole! You must remember!" Li Delun and others said.
"OK! You were caught!"
"Ha ha ha ha! You? A homeless? Caught us?"
"I'm a police officer! You're caught just now!"
Then, appear many police officers around.
"No no no no no way! I don't want to come back there!" Dole said.
"Follow us or else..."
"Wait wait wait wait no! We're gonna follow you!"
"Follow us! You are the second time to want to leave prison!" That homeless said.
"Go!"Li Delun and others return to the prison again.

chapters/third/escape-in-death.html.title: Escape in death
chapters/third/escape-in-death.html.description:
Several months later. Li Delun is like before that it’s to work, did fart cushion for Big Baby and slept. Till that time. Big Baby made a fart very big.We don’t know why his fart got so smelly. Maybe he ate so many chives or yams yesterday.Li Delun smoked fart. He dizzied. But Big baby thought he die.“Small Baby! Throw him away! Can’t make police know us kill guy!” Big Baby shout.“Yes sir!” Small Baby said to Big Baby.Small baby called two guys to throw Li Delun away. They plan to throw Li Delun outside of prison.After Li Delun was thrown by them. He awoke.“Where is here?” Li Delun said.“Is here outside of prison?” He said again.“Well! I’m free!” Li Delun said.“But I must modify my name and some information or else I will be found by them.” He said again.(2 hours later)“Okay! I have modified my name! Then, my name is Li Qin.” Li Delun is happy to leave there.Some polices got to near of Li Delun while Li Delun is on foot.“Stop! I feel you are like our prisoner Li Delun. Are you Li Delun or you know Li Delun?” A police officer said.“None. I’m not Li Delun” he said.“May be, it’s my mistake. Sorry citizen. I think you are that prisoner.” That police officer said.“It’s okay. Can you leave?” he said.“Oh! We leave.”“Guys! Leave here! This citizen isn’t Li Delun!” That police officer said.“Yes sir!” others said.(Several days later.)“Oh! Very good! No police officer. No big baby! Make me happy!” Li Delun came out from his new home.“I’m going to the supermarket to buy something.” He said again.(Sense: the supermarket. Li Delun has bought things. He is going to pay money.)“Why does I feel like the wanted criminal Li Delun?” She spoke.”None! I’m called Li Qin. It’s not Li Delun” Li Delun said.“Maybe my memory appear problem.” She spoke.”How much money?” he said."86 $” she said."So expensive?” he said. But he paid money."Welcome you come again." She spoke."I'm going to my home" Li Delun said.Several hours later.
"Finally, I arrived at home." Li Delun said."Oh! I'm going to bath!" Li Delun is happily said."I love the world!"However, 1 month later.
Appear police officers outside of Li Delun's home."Open door! We know that you are inside" one of police officer said.
"Oh no! spare me!" Li Delun said
"Tootle! Follow us or else..."After Li Delun was caught to prison.
All of prisoners started talking"Look! Why do Li Delun come back here?"
"Right! Hasn't he die?""Follow us! This is your cell! 78 cell!" police officer said.
"Should I be 67 cell?" Li Delun said.
"That cell had lived by a new prisoner" he said.
"Alright! The rest time has done!" the police said.Tomorrow.
Li Delun is like before. He mined, but his daily demand was risen to 8 kg. "Why do you rise my demand to 8 kg?" Li Delun found the guard.
"Because you are the 2nd time enter the prison." the guard said.
"Alright! This is mine." Li Delun said.
"You can go having lunch." the guard said.
"Alright!" Li Delun said.

Place: Ming Zhe residential quarter, Silly city
Saying: I f*** your immortalLi Delun, he is the most unlucky character. He ever wanted to escape prison, then, he don't want to escape because he found his real home. He became warden's gardener, he looks after warden's vegetables.

I’m the first finish work!” Li Delun’s face is full of happiness.“Look, you are the first finish work so you can go having lunch.” The guard said.Li Delun went to the dining hall. He chose a plate of cooked steak.“Well! Today’s food got delicious! But the environment is so bad!” Li Delun ate steak, said.At 2:15 p.m., free time. Li Delun would go back to his cell.Suddenly, a guy appeared.“Bucko! Stop running” he said.“Why?” Li Delun said.“We watched you are very long! Our boss ’Big baby’ asked you to do his fart cushion!” that guy said.“If I say ‘None’?” Li Delun said.The guy took a fake gun out.“Follow me or else…”“Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! Wait! The guy. I agree your demand!” Li Delun is very afraid. He was scared that guy was starting to start the gun.“OK! Introduce me. My name is ‘Small Baby’. It’s our boss’ brother.” He spoke.
“So, tell me where ‘Big baby’ is cell?” Li Delun said.“Okay! Follow me.”Li Delun followed him. 5 minutes later, they got to “Big baby” is cell.He saw a tubby after Li Delun entered the cell. That guy is very fat.

info_selector.description: 用于定位元素的CSS选择器。功能将相对于该元素放置。

info_type.description: 该功能将放置在该元素之前、之后，还是内部（开头或结尾）。

info_featurePlacement.description: 将此功能放置在页面上的位置（相对于选择器）。

info_displayTitle.description: 功能上方显示的描述性标题

info_showOrphanNodes.description: 显示未连接到任何其他节点的节点。

info_showAttachments.description: 将附件（如图像和PDF）显示为图中的节点。

info_allowGlobalGraph.description: 允许用户查看所有节点的全局图。

info_allowExpand.description: 允许用户将图形视图弹出至全屏显示。

info_attractionForce.description: 链接节点之间的吸引力有多大？吸引力越大，图形将显得越集中。

info_linkLength.description: 节点之间的链接应有多长？链接越短，节点将聚集得更紧密。

info_repulsionForce.description: 节点之间的排斥力有多大？排斥力越大，分离的节点将分散得越远。

info_centralForce.description: 节点被吸引到中心的程度有多大？吸引力越大，图形看起来越密集和呈圆形。

info_edgePruning.description: 超过此阈值长度的边将不会显示，但仍然参与图形计算。这有助于大型复杂图形显得更加有序。悬停在节点上时，仍会显示这些链接。

info_minNodeRadius.description: 最小节点的大小是多少？节点越小，吸引其他节点的力量越小。

info_maxNodeRadius.description: 最大节点的大小是多少？节点大小取决于它们的链接数量。节点越大，吸引其他节点的力量越大。这有助于围绕最重要的节点形成良好的分组。

info_allowResizing.description: 是否允许用户调整侧边栏的大小

info_allowCollapsing.description: 是否允许用户折叠侧边栏

info_selector.description: 用于定位元素的CSS选择器。功能将相对于该元素放置。

info_type.description: 该功能将放置在该元素之前、之后，还是内部（开头或结尾）。

info_featurePlacement.description: 将此功能放置在页面上的位置（相对于选择器）。
